title: Finite Root-Finding Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite root-finding replay rows plus explicit bad Newton-step and bad bisection-width QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Newton-step replay computes next = 17/12 from x = 3/2 for x^2 - 2 while one malformed row claims next = 4/3; exact bisection replay computes selected width 1/2 while another malformed row claims width 1/3.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional root-finding rows only when they add distinct derivative, iteration, residual, or numerical-honesty pressure beyond the current Newton-step and bisection-width rows; keep convergence rates, existence/uniqueness, and floating-point stability in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite root-finding traces as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay bisection and Newton witnesses through exact polynomial evaluation.
Keep false finite iterate and bisection-width source claims as replay-only rows that compute the offending values.
Route the resulting fixed contradictions through separate checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence rows.
Keep root existence, uniqueness, convergence rates, and floating-point stability marked Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty until formal routes exist.
